nodes.name: PinLikelihoodEvaluation
nodes.description: Computes the likelihood of observed inputs under the provided parameterization.
nodes.type_signature: (params: parameter object or vector, B: observed data tensor/array, S: observed data tensor/array) -> float or array-like likelihood value
nodes.conceptual_summary: Parametric Observation Likelihood Scorer. Maps a parameterization and one or more observed tensors to the probability mass/density (or its equivalent score) assigned by a specified stochastic model. The operation compares observed values against model-implied distributions and aggregates per-element or per-sample contributions into a scalar or vector likelihood. This is an evaluation step only: it scores model fit without updating parameters.. Applications: Sensor-fusion model scoring in robotics by evaluating how well multi-channel measurements match hypothesized state parameters, Sequence-generation fit assessment in computational biology by scoring observed symbolic/numeric sequences under parametric generative models, Inverse-model validation in geophysics by evaluating observed field measurements under candidate subsurface parameter sets, Anomaly scoring in industrial monitoring by comparing streaming multivariate telemetry against calibrated probabilistic baselines
